name: Brick 7-1 (Slynyrd)
description: Classic Slynyrd dungeon-floor brick. 16x16 tile = 4 stones of 7x7 separated by 1px mortar at x=7,y=7. One stone per quadrant.
rule_summary: Mortar at columns/rows {7, 15} (1px wide). Each stone is exactly 7x7. Add 1-2 chips per stone for weathering. Keep features inside 7x7 - never cross mortar.

layers.name: GUIDE
layers.purpose: Mortar grid + stone boundaries. Toggle on while drawing, hide before export.

layers.name: MORTAR
layers.purpose: Pre-fill the mortar grid at the canonical positions.

layers.name: stone
layers.purpose: Main paint layer for stone face. Stay in 7x7 quadrants.

layers.name: highlight
layers.purpose: NW edge highlight. Top + left of each stone, 1px line.

layers.name: weathering
layers.purpose: Chips, cracks, moss. Place 1-2 small features per stone, never crossing mortar.
